results.title: DIRECTOR OF AGRICULTURE FISHERIES AND CONSERVATION V. HOI YUEN GINSENG CO
results.coram: Before: Her Honour Judge G. Chow in Chambers (Open to Public)
results.parties: IN THE MATTER of an application under section 42 of the Protection of Endangered Species of Animals and Plants Ordinance, Cap. 586 and IN THE MATTER of the forfeiture of 982.35 kg of Panax quinquefolius (American ginseng) seized on behalf of the Director of Agriculture, Fisheries and Conservation.
results.representations: Ms Emily Kwong, Government Counsel of Department of Justice, for the Plaintiff The Defendant was represented by Mr Chu Ming Chee, appeared in person
